html:
Exclusive to:

Mussels are a Fish Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They can be harvested from Mussel Beds that are found in the Shallow Ocean using a Mussel Stick or a Trawl Net. Mussels can be used as an ingredient in Crock Pot recipes. Warly needs them to cook Mussel Bouillabaise in his Portable Crock Pot. Additionally, Mussels can also be used to craft a new Mussel Bed that can be planted in the Ocean by the player.

Cooked Mussel

The Cooked Mussel is a fish food item made by cooking a Mussel on a Campfire, Fire Pit, Star, Chiminea, or Obsidian Fire Pit. They do not deduct Sanity, unlike their raw counterpart, restore a tiny bit of health, and take longer to spoil. They can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, in which they will give 0.5 Fish Value.

“Could use some flexing.”
–Wilson, when examining a Mussel.
“Open up, fella.”
–Willow, when examining a Mussel.
“My muscles are much bigger!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Mussel.
“You cannot hide beneath the waves, meat!”
–Wendy, when examining a Mussel.
“MUSCULATURE NOT DETECTED”
–WX-78, when examining a Mussel.
“Clamus wetus. Very nutritious.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Mussel.
“Those look like good eating.”
–Woodie, when examining a Mussel.
“They're a delicacy... somewhere.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Mussel.
“Consuming raw seafood never produces favorable results for me.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Mussel.
“Yöu dön't löök ströng.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Mussel.
“Maybe one day I'll have big mussels.”
–Webber, when examining a Mussel.
“I could eat a hundred of these.”
–Walani, when examining a Mussel.
“Into my tummy you go! Good bi, valves.”
–Warly, when examining a Mussel.
“Woodlegs loves a mussel!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Mussel.
“'TIS MEAT INSHELL'D WITHIN”
–Wilba, when examining a Mussel.
“Hiding”
–Wormwood, when examining a Mussel.
“Eating raw seafood would be an adventure.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Mussel.
Mussels are a Fish Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They can be harvested from Mussel Beds that are found in the Shallow Ocean using a Mussel Stick or a Trawl Net. Mussels can be used as an ingredient in Crock Pot recipes. Warly needs them to cook Mussel Bouillabaise in his Portable Crock Pot. Additionally, Mussels can also be used to craft a new Mussel Bed that can be planted in the Ocean by the player.
Cooked Mussel[edit | edit source]
“I cook a mean mussel.”
–Wilson, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“The fire opens their shell.”
–Willow, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Mussels become protein for muscles!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“I sure strong-armed this mussel.”
–Wendy, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“FLAVOR MOLECULES ARE STRONG”
–WX-78, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Don't eat the shell.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“These look tasty.”
–Woodie, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Looks to be less of a health hazard now.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Significantly more pleasurable when consumed cooked.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Ströng taste.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Still kind of gross.”
–Webber, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Needs shallots.”
–Walani, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Could use shallots and lemongrass...”
–Warly, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Yarrr, thet's good.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“FWOOSH'D INSHELL'D MEAT”
–Wilba, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“For belly”
–Wormwood, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
“Tiny little snacks from the sea.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Cooked Mussel.
The Cooked Mussel is a fish food item made by cooking a Mussel on a Campfire, Fire Pit, Star, Chiminea, or Obsidian Fire Pit. They do not deduct Sanity, unlike their raw counterpart, restore a tiny bit of health, and take longer to spoil. They can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, in which they will give 0.5 Fish Value.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trai là một Thực Phẩm Cá được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng có thể được thu hoạch từ các Vẹm tìm thấy ở Biển Nông bằng cách sử dụng Que Vẹm hoặc Lưới Rà. Trai có thể được dùng làm nguyên liệu trong các công thức nấu Nồi Hầm. Warly cần họ để nấu Súp Vẹm trong Nồi Hầm Di Động của anh ấy. Ngoài ra, Trai cũng có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Giường Trai mới mà người chơi có thể trồng ở Biển.
